dialog_ad.title: ❤️ Support PluginStream Development!
dialog_ad.message:
## 🚀 Keep PluginStream Alive & Running!

To keep PluginStream **Active, Fast, and 100% Working**, we incur significant costs for maintaining back-end servers and continuous development.

We are not asking you for any money—all we need is a little bit of your support! A small action from your side can make a massive difference for us.

### ✨ **How You Can Help:**
- By watching just **one short ad**, you directly contribute toward covering our ongoing server costs.
- This ensures all app plugins and features remain completely free and up-to-date for everyone.

### ⏰ **Just a Few Seconds:**
Your emotional and practical support means everything to us as we strive to maintain premium links and a secure infrastructure.

### 💰 **Cost:**
**100% Free (Only Watch 1 Short Ad)**

*Show your love and support our small team by clicking below!*
